description: Subset of icicle_adjacent_conference_queries.json — the 6 venue queries added in the landscape pass (ISLS, JoLE, JLS, LE keyword sweep, CMU ITS lineage, DBR). Used for incremental harvest into ieee_conference_seed_work_ids.json with --merge-existing.

queries.label: International Society of the Learning Sciences Annual Meeting
queries.openalex_search: International Society Learning Sciences annual conference
queries.note: ISLS provides the socio-cultural and qualitative counterbalance to EDM/LAK. Important for DBR methodology papers and socio-cognitive learning frameworks cited by LE practitioners.

queries.label: Journal of Learning Engineering (JoLE)
queries.note: The only journal dedicated to LE as a named field. Diamond OA; ICICLE-produced. Papers often not well-connected in citation networks because the field is young — venue search is necessary to surface them.

queries.label: Journal of the Learning Sciences foundational papers
queries.openalex_search: Journal of the Learning Sciences design experiments
queries.note: Targeted search for DBR methodology and socio-cognitive frameworks. Brown 1992 and Scardamalia & Bereiter 1994 published here. Cross-seed scoring will filter; trust_query=false to avoid flooding with adjacent LS papers.

queries.label: learning engineering keyword title search
queries.note: Explicit title/abstract search for the named field. Catches papers that use the LE label but are not connected to ICICLE conference networks. trust_query=false because 'learning engineering' appears in tangential contexts; cross-seed scoring will filter.

queries.label: Cognitive Tutor and CMU ITS foundational work
queries.openalex_search: cognitive tutor intelligent tutoring Carnegie Mellon
queries.note: Author-cluster search for the CMU ITS lineage (Anderson, Koedinger, Corbett). These foundational papers are the empirical basis of the LE field but often predate the 'learning engineering' label. Cross-seed scoring from new LS-SEED-003/004/006 will recover them.

queries.label: Design-based research in learning
queries.note: Targeted harvest for DBR methodology literature (Brown 1992 lineage). Addresses gap g_008: T17 Research Methods currently has zero academic papers; this search will feed one-hop from LS-SEED-001.
